bracu_official.title: BRAC University IEEE society hosts seminar on careers in big tech and ai startups
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University IEEE society will host a seminar focusing on career opportunities in big tech and AI startups.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University and Sporsho Braille Foundation visit Baptist Mission Integrated School
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University, in collaboration with the Sporsho Braille Foundation, visited the Baptist Mission Integrated School.

bracu_official.title: Argentine ambassador joins BRAC University students to watch his home team’s World Cup quarter-final match
bracu_official.summary: The Argentine ambassador joined BRAC University students to watch his home country's World Cup quarter-final match.
